channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI Beats Junior Coders
item.description: See AI tools that outcode juniors, get insights on their coding capabilities and limitations.

item.title: Mobile Security Risks: Fix Now
item.description: Protect your mobile device from hackers. Fix common security vulnerabilities and safeguard your data with expert fixes.

item.title: Prompt Power
item.description: Unlock prompt engineering secrets for real-world apps, boosting efficiency and accuracy in AI models.

item.title: Platform Power
item.description: Unlock platform business models' secrets: understand key components, benefits, and success strategies to drive growth.

item.title: Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs SQS
item.description: Compare Kafka, RabbitMQ, and SQS: pros, cons, and use cases for choosing the best message queue for your needs.

item.title: AI Meets Money
item.description: Boost financial literacy with AI-powered tools and strategies to automate savings, invest smarter, and reduce debt.

item.title: EDA in Action
item.description: See EDA in action: real-world examples, implementation tips, and benefits of event-driven systems.

item.title: JS Game Changers
item.description: Unlock JavaScript's full potential with 5 game-changing features that revolutionized coding, boosting efficiency and productivity.

item.title: FastTrack Tech
item.description: Unlock rapid career growth in tech: Get actionable tips to boost visibility, skills and promotions in record time.

item.title: Goroutines Unleashed
item.description: Unlock concurrent programming with goroutines, mastering Go's lightweight threads for efficient sync and async operations.

item.title: Server vs Client
item.description: Learn the difference between server & client components in web development.

item.title: AI's Limits
item.description: Explore AI's limitations & where humans still reign supreme.

item.title: Code: Not for All
item.description: Challenging the 'code for all' mantra, exploring the reality of coding accessibility.

item.title: Edge Up...
item.description: Discover how edge computing boosts app performance & security. Learn why it matters for your business.

item.title: React vs Flutter
item.description: React Native vs Flutter: Which wins in 2026? Discover the ultimate comparison.

item.title: LLM Decoded...
item.description: Unlock AI secrets: Discover how Large Language Models work and their impact on Generative AI.

item.title: Hack Like Me
item.description: Learn how ethical hackers think & penetrate systems with expert insights on penetration testing.

item.title: Test Deeper
item.description: Elevate API testing beyond Postman. Learn advanced techniques in 'Test Deeper'

item.title: Dirty Data?
item.description: Discover how dirty data sabotages your analytics & learn to clean up for accurate insights

item.title: AR Evolved: Apple Vision Pro
item.description: Discover Apple Vision Pro's impact on AR development & innovation.
